mitigations.mitigation_name: Enforce egress-through-authenticated-proxy with permit-listing: require all endpoints to route HTTP(S) traffic through a corporate authenticated forward proxy (or secure web gateway) that enforces hostname allow-lists, blocks direct outbound connections to arbitrary IPs, enforces request size limits, and logs/inspects uploads before permitting them.

args.command:
config firewall address
edit "ATTACKER_C2"
set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
next
edit "LAN_HOST_192.168.1.3"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall address
edit "LAN_HOST_192.168.1.3"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall service custom
edit "TCP_8443"
set tcp-portrange 8443
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Block_C2_egress"
set srcintf "any"
set dstintf "any"
set srcaddr "LAN_HOST_192.168.1.3"
set dstaddr "ATTACKER_C2"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "TCP_8443"
set logtraffic all
next
end

config firewall address
edit "LAN_HOST_192.168.1.3"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Block_C2_egress"
set srcintf "any"
set dstintf "any"
set srcaddr "LAN_HOST_192.168.1.3"
set dstaddr "ATTACKER_C2"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "TCP_8443"
set logtraffic all
move 1
next
end

execute log filter field action deny
execute log display
